mapper.select: SELECT category.id AS category_id, IFNULL(category.name, '未分类') AS category_name, product.id AS product_id, product.name AS product_name, contract.id AS contract_id, contract.no AS contract_no, contract.name AS contract_name, contract.owner_user_id, owner.nickname AS owner_user_name, customer.id AS customer_id, customer.name AS customer_name, contract_product.product_price, contract_product.count AS product_count, contract_product.total_price AS product_total_price FROM crm_contract_product AS contract_product INNER JOIN crm_contract AS contract ON contract_product.contract_id = contract.id INNER JOIN crm_product AS product ON contract_product.product_id = product.id LEFT JOIN crm_product_category AS category ON product.category_id = category.id AND category.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN crm_customer AS customer ON contract.customer_id = customer.id AND customer.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN system_users AS owner ON contract.owner_user_id = owner.id AND owner.deleted = 0 WHERE ORDER BY category.id ASC, product.id ASC, contract.order_date DESC

SELECT category.id AS category_id, IFNULL(category.name, '未分类') AS category_name, COUNT(DISTINCT contract.id) AS contract_count, IFNULL(SUM(contract_product.count), 0) AS product_count, IFNULL(SUM(contract_product.total_price), 0) AS product_total_price FROM crm_contract_product AS contract_product INNER JOIN crm_contract AS contract ON contract_product.contract_id = contract.id INNER JOIN crm_product AS product ON contract_product.product_id = product.id LEFT JOIN crm_product_category AS category ON product.category_id = category.id AND category.deleted = 0 WHERE GROUP BY category.id, category.name ORDER BY product_total_price DESC, product_count DESC
